pdfMerge.title: Merge PDF
pdfMerge.desc: Combine multiple PDFs into a single document.

meta.title: Merge PDF – Free Online PDF Merge
meta.description: Merge multiple PDF files into one. Drag and drop to reorder, download instantly. Free, in-browser.

pdfMerge.heading: Merge PDF
pdfMerge.sub: Select, reorder, and merge PDF files into a single document.
pdfMerge.errMin: Please select at least 2 PDF files.

faq.q: How do I merge PDF files online for free?
faq.a: Upload your PDF files, reorder them using the arrows, then click Merge PDFs. Your merged file downloads instantly — no signup required.

faq.q: Is there a file size limit for merging PDFs?
faq.a: There is no hard size cap. Large files may take a few seconds but are handled entirely in your browser.

faq.q: Are my PDF files uploaded to a server?
faq.a: No. All merging happens in your browser using PDF-lib. Your files never leave your device.

faq.q: How many PDF files can I merge at once?
faq.a: There is no limit. Add as many PDFs as you need and reorder them before merging.

faq.q: Can I merge password-protected PDFs?
faq.a: Unlock them first with the Unlock PDF tool, then merge the unlocked files.

pdfSplit.title: Split PDF
pdfSplit.desc: Split PDF pages into separate files.

meta.title: Split PDF – Free Online PDF Splitter
meta.description: Split PDF pages into separate files. Enter page range and download. Free, in-browser.

pdfSplit.heading: Split PDF
pdfSplit.sub: Split PDF pages into separate files.
pdfSplit.errRange: Please enter a valid page range.

faq.q: How do I split a PDF into separate pages?
faq.a: Upload your PDF, select the page range you want to extract, and click Split. Each range downloads as a separate PDF.

faq.q: Can I extract a single page from a PDF?
faq.a: Yes. Enter that page number in the range selector and only that page will be extracted.

faq.q: Will splitting reduce PDF quality?
faq.a: No. Pages are extracted without re-encoding so quality is preserved exactly.

faq.q: Is my PDF data safe when splitting?
faq.a: Yes. The operation runs in your browser and no data is sent to any server.

faq.q: Can I split a large PDF with many pages?
faq.a: Yes. The tool handles large PDFs well, though very large files may take a few extra seconds.

pdfEdit.title: Edit PDF

meta.title: Edit PDF – Free Online PDF Editor
meta.description: Delete pages, reorder with drag and drop, and save. Free, in-browser.

pdfEdit.heading: Edit PDF
pdfEdit.sub: Delete pages, reorder (drag or arrow keys), and save.
pdfEdit.allDeleted: You deleted all pages. Please select a new file.

faq.q: Can I delete pages from a PDF for free?
faq.a: Yes. Upload your PDF, select the pages you want to remove by clicking their thumbnails, and click Delete Selected. The edited PDF downloads immediately.

faq.q: Can I reorder pages in a PDF?
faq.a: Yes. Drag and drop the page thumbnails to reorder them, then save the result.

faq.q: Does editing a PDF change its quality?
faq.a: No. Pages are rearranged without re-rendering so image and text quality stays the same.

faq.q: Is the PDF editor free to use?
faq.a: Yes, completely free with no account required.

faq.q: Can I edit text inside a PDF?
faq.a: This tool focuses on page-level editing. For adding notes and highlights, use the Annotate PDF tool.

meta.title: Rotate PDF – Free Online
meta.description: Rotate PDF pages 90°, 180°, or 270°. Free, in-browser.

faq.q: How do I rotate PDF pages online?
faq.a: Upload your PDF, select the pages you want to rotate, choose the angle (90°, 180°, 270°), and download.

faq.q: Can I rotate only specific pages in a PDF?
faq.a: Yes. Click individual page thumbnails to select them, then apply rotation to just those pages.

faq.q: Does rotating a PDF reduce quality?
faq.a: No. Rotation is applied at the PDF structure level without re-rendering any content.

faq.q: Can I rotate a scanned PDF?
faq.a: Yes. The tool works on all PDF types including scanned documents.

faq.q: Is my PDF uploaded to a server when rotating?
faq.a: No. All processing happens in your browser — your files stay on your device.

pdfCompress.title: Compress PDF

meta.title: Compress PDF – Free Online
meta.description: Reduce PDF file size. In-browser, files never leave your device.

pdfCompress.heading: Compress PDF
pdfCompress.sub: Reduce PDF file size. Runs in your browser, files never leave your device.

faq.q: How do I reduce the size of a PDF file for free?
faq.a: Upload your PDF, choose your compression level, and click Compress. The tool reduces file size while keeping content readable.

faq.q: How much can PDF compression reduce file size?
faq.a: Depending on content, compression can reduce file size by 20–80%. PDFs with many high-resolution images compress the most.

faq.q: Will compressing a PDF affect text quality?
faq.a: Text quality is preserved. Compression mainly targets embedded images and removes unnecessary metadata.

faq.q: Is there a size limit for PDF compression?
faq.a: No hard limit. Large PDFs may take more time to process in the browser.

faq.q: Can I compress a PDF without losing quality?
faq.a: Choose the low compression option for minimal quality loss. Higher compression reduces size more but may soften images slightly.

pdfPageNumber.title: Add Page Numbers
pdfPageNumber.desc: Stamp page numbers on each page.

meta.title: Add Page Numbers – Free Online
meta.description: Automatically stamp page numbers on every page. Choose position.

pdfPageNumber.heading: Add Page Numbers to PDF
pdfPageNumber.sub: Automatically stamp page numbers on every page. Choose position.

faq.q: How do I add page numbers to a PDF?
faq.a: Upload your PDF, choose position, font size, and starting number, then click Add Page Numbers. Your PDF downloads with numbers on every page.

faq.q: Can I customize the page number position?
faq.a: Yes. Choose top or bottom, left, center, or right of each page.

faq.q: Can I start page numbering from a specific number?
faq.a: Yes. Set the starting number — useful when the PDF is part of a larger document.

faq.q: Does adding page numbers change PDF content?
faq.a: Only the page number text is added. All original content remains unchanged.

faq.q: Is page numbering free?
faq.a: Yes, completely free, no account needed.

pdfToJpg.title: PDF → JPG
pdfToJpg.desc: Convert PDF pages to JPG images.

meta.title: PDF to JPG – Free Online
meta.description: Convert PDF pages to JPG images. Free, in-browser.

pdfToJpg.heading: PDF → JPG
pdfToJpg.sub: Convert PDF pages to JPG images. Each page is downloaded as a separate file.

faq.q: How do I convert PDF to JPG online for free?
faq.a: Upload your PDF, select the pages to convert, choose image quality, and click Convert. Each page downloads as a separate JPG.

faq.q: Can I convert a specific PDF page to JPG?
faq.a: Yes. Select individual pages instead of converting the entire document.

faq.q: What quality are the output JPG images?
faq.a: Choose from standard, high, or maximum quality. Higher quality produces larger but sharper images.

faq.q: Can I convert all pages of a PDF at once?
faq.a: Yes. Select All Pages and all pages are converted and zipped for download.

faq.q: Are my PDF files safe during conversion?
faq.a: Yes. Conversion happens in your browser — nothing is uploaded to a server.

pdfFromJpg.title: JPG → PDF
pdfFromJpg.desc: Convert images into a single PDF file.

meta.title: JPG to PDF – Free Online
meta.description: Convert images into a single PDF file. Free, in-browser.

pdfFromJpg.heading: JPG → PDF
pdfFromJpg.sub: Convert images into a single PDF file. You can add multiple images.
pdfFromJpg.drop: Drag image files here (JPG, PNG, WEBP)

faq.q: How do I convert JPG images to PDF?
faq.a: Upload one or more JPG images, reorder them if needed, and click Convert to PDF. All images are combined into a single PDF.

faq.q: Can I convert multiple images into one PDF?
faq.a: Yes. Add multiple images and they will all be included as separate pages in one PDF.

faq.q: What image formats are supported?
faq.a: JPG/JPEG and PNG images are supported.

faq.q: Will image quality be reduced in the PDF?
faq.a: No. Images are embedded in the PDF at their original resolution.

faq.q: Is there a limit on the number of images I can combine?
faq.a: No limit. Add as many images as you need.

pdfWatermark.title: PDF Watermark
pdfWatermark.desc: Add CONFIDENTIAL, DRAFT stamps to pages.

meta.title: PDF Watermark – Free Online
meta.description: Add text watermarks to PDF pages. Free, in-browser.

pdfWatermark.heading: PDF Watermark
pdfWatermark.sub: Add text watermarks to PDF pages. Runs in your browser.

faq.q: How do I add a watermark to a PDF?
faq.a: Upload your PDF, type your watermark text, choose font size, opacity, position, and color, then click Add Watermark. The watermarked PDF downloads instantly.

faq.q: Can I make the watermark transparent?
faq.a: Yes. Adjust the opacity slider to make the watermark more or less transparent.

faq.q: Can I position the watermark anywhere on the page?
faq.a: Choose from preset positions: center, top-left, top-right, bottom-left, bottom-right.

faq.q: Will the watermark be on every page?
faq.a: Yes. The watermark is applied to all pages of the PDF.

faq.q: Can I remove a watermark that I added?
faq.a: This tool adds watermarks. Removing watermarks already embedded in a PDF is not supported.

pdfSign.title: Sign PDF
pdfSign.desc: Draw your signature and embed it into a PDF page.

meta.title: Sign PDF – Free Online
meta.description: Draw your signature, pick a page, and embed it. Free, in-browser.

pdfSign.heading: Sign PDF
pdfSign.sub: Draw your signature, select a page, position it, and embed it into the PDF.
pdfSign.posNote: * Position is approximate; pixel precision is applied in the final PDF.

faq.q: How do I sign a PDF online for free?
faq.a: Upload your PDF, draw or type your signature, drag it to the correct position, then click Save and Download.

faq.q: Can I draw my signature on a PDF?
faq.a: Yes. Use draw mode to create a handwritten signature directly in your browser.

faq.q: Is my electronic signature legally valid?
faq.a: Simple electronic signatures are recognized in many jurisdictions for personal and business use. For legally binding contracts, consult local laws.

faq.q: Can I sign multiple pages?
faq.a: Yes. Navigate between pages and place your signature on each one.

faq.q: Is my signature stored or uploaded?
faq.a: No. Your signature and document are processed entirely in your browser and never sent to any server.

pdfToWord.title: PDF → Word
pdfToWord.desc: Convert a PDF file to Word format.

meta.title: PDF to Word – Free Online
meta.description: Convert PDF to Word (.docx) format. Coming soon.

pdfToWord.heading: PDF → Word
pdfToWord.sub: Convert a PDF file to Word (.docx) format.
pdfToWord.note: Note: PDF → Word conversion requires server-side processing. This feature is coming soon.

faq.q: Can I convert PDF to Word online?
faq.a: This feature is coming soon. PDF to Word conversion requires server-side OCR processing which is currently under development.

faq.q: Why is PDF to Word conversion difficult?
faq.a: PDFs store content as visual elements, not editable text. Accurate conversion requires optical character recognition (OCR).

faq.q: What is the alternative to PDF to Word conversion?
faq.a: Use the Edit PDF tool to delete or reorder pages, or the Annotate PDF tool to add notes without converting.

faq.q: When will PDF to Word be available?
faq.a: We are working on it. It will be available as a Pro feature with server-side processing.

faq.q: Will PDF to Word be free?
faq.a: A basic version will be free. Higher accuracy and larger files will be in the Pro plan.

pdfLock.title: Lock PDF

meta.title: Lock PDF – Free Online
meta.description: Password-protect your PDF with encryption. Free, in-browser.

pdfLock.heading: Lock PDF
pdfLock.sub: Password-protect your PDF file with encryption.
pdfLock.privacy: All processing happens in your browser. Your files are never sent to a server.
pdfLock.warning: The PDF will require this password to open. Keep it safe — it cannot be recovered.

faq.q: How do I password protect a PDF for free?
faq.a: Upload your PDF, enter a password, and click Lock PDF. The encrypted PDF downloads to your device.

faq.q: What encryption is used to protect the PDF?
faq.a: PDFs are encrypted with 128-bit RC4 encryption, compatible with all major PDF viewers.

faq.q: Will I lose any content when locking the PDF?
faq.a: No. Only encryption is applied — all content and pages remain exactly as they are.

faq.q: Are my files uploaded when adding a password?
faq.a: No. Encryption is applied entirely in your browser using PDF-lib.

faq.q: Can I set different passwords for opening and editing?
faq.a: The current tool sets a single document open password. Advanced permission passwords are not yet supported.

pdfUnlock.title: Unlock PDF
pdfUnlock.desc: Remove password protection from a PDF file.

meta.title: Unlock PDF – Free Online
meta.description: Remove password protection from a PDF. Free, in-browser.

pdfUnlock.heading: Unlock PDF
pdfUnlock.sub: Remove password protection from a PDF file.
pdfUnlock.privacy: All processing happens in your browser. Your files are never sent to a server.
pdfUnlock.note: You must know the current password to unlock the PDF. This tool does not bypass passwords.
pdfUnlock.errGeneric: An error occurred. Make sure the file is a valid password-protected PDF.

faq.q: How do I remove a password from a PDF?
faq.a: Upload the password-protected PDF, enter the current password, and click Unlock PDF. The unlocked PDF downloads immediately.

faq.q: Can I unlock a PDF without knowing the password?
faq.a: No. The password is required to decrypt the file. This tool removes protection once you provide the correct password.

faq.q: Is it legal to unlock a PDF?
faq.a: Yes, if you own the document or have permission from the owner.

faq.q: Does unlocking a PDF affect its content?
faq.a: No. Only the encryption layer is removed. All pages and content stay exactly the same.

faq.q: Is the PDF uploaded to a server during unlocking?
faq.a: No. The decryption process runs entirely in your browser.

pdfCrop.title: Crop PDF
pdfCrop.desc: Trim the margins of every page in your PDF.

meta.title: Crop PDF – Free Online
meta.description: Trim margins from every page in your PDF. Free, in-browser.

pdfCrop.heading: Crop PDF
pdfCrop.sub: Trim the margins of every page in your PDF.
pdfCrop.privacy: All processing happens in your browser. Your files are never sent to a server.
pdfCrop.removingDesc: Removing {top}mm top · {right}mm right · {bottom}mm bottom · {left}mm left from each page

faq.q: How do I crop a PDF page?
faq.a: Upload your PDF, select the crop area using the handles on each page, and click Crop. The cropped PDF downloads with your specified margins applied.

faq.q: Can I crop all pages of a PDF at once?
faq.a: Yes. Apply the same crop area to all pages using the Apply to All option.

faq.q: Does cropping reduce PDF file size?
faq.a: Slightly. The visible area is reduced but for significant size reduction, use the Compress PDF tool afterward.

faq.q: Can I undo a crop before downloading?
faq.a: Yes. Adjust the crop area as many times as needed before downloading.

faq.q: Is PDF cropping free?
faq.a: Yes. Completely free, no registration needed.

pdfFormFill.title: Fill PDF Form
pdfFormFill.desc: Fill in text fields, checkboxes and dropdowns in a PDF.

meta.title: Fill PDF Form – Free Online
meta.description: Fill in text fields, checkboxes and dropdowns in a PDF form. Free, in-browser.

pdfFormFill.heading: Fill PDF Form
pdfFormFill.sub: Fill in text fields, checkboxes, and dropdowns in a PDF form.
pdfFormFill.privacy: All processing happens in your browser. Your files are never sent to a server.
pdfFormFill.noFields: No fillable form fields found in this PDF. Try a PDF that contains form fields.
pdfFormFill.clickHint: Click on highlighted fields above to type. Use the navigation buttons to switch pages.

faq.q: How do I fill out a PDF form online?
faq.a: Upload your PDF form, click on each form field, type your information, then click Save and Download to get the filled form.

faq.q: Does this work with interactive PDF forms?
faq.a: Yes. The tool detects interactive form fields (text boxes, checkboxes, dropdowns) and lets you fill them directly.

faq.q: Can I fill a PDF that does not have form fields?
faq.a: For PDFs without form fields, use the Annotate PDF tool to add text on top of the document.

faq.q: Will the filled PDF be compatible with PDF readers?
faq.a: Yes. The output is a standard PDF readable by Adobe Acrobat, Preview, and all major PDF viewers.

faq.q: Is my form data uploaded to a server?
faq.a: No. Everything happens in your browser — your data is never sent anywhere.

pdfAnnotate.title: Annotate PDF
pdfAnnotate.desc: Draw, highlight and add text notes to your PDF.

meta.title: Annotate PDF – Free Online
meta.description: Draw, highlight and add text notes to your PDF. Free, in-browser.

pdfAnnotate.heading: Annotate PDF
pdfAnnotate.sub: Draw, highlight, and add text notes to your PDF.
pdfAnnotate.privacy: All processing happens in your browser. Your files are never sent to a server.
pdfAnnotate.textHint: Click anywhere on the PDF to add a text note.
pdfAnnotate.highlightHint: Click and drag to highlight a region.
pdfAnnotate.eraserHint: Draw over annotations to erase them.

faq.q: How do I annotate a PDF online?
faq.a: Upload your PDF, use the toolbar to add text, draw, or highlight content, then click Save and Download.

faq.q: What annotation types are supported?
faq.a: You can add text labels, freehand drawings, and highlight rectangles. Choose tool, color, and size from the toolbar.

faq.q: Can I remove annotations I added?
faq.a: Annotations are flattened into the PDF when saved. To remove them, re-upload the original file.

faq.q: Does annotating work on scanned PDFs?
faq.a: Yes. Annotations are drawn as an overlay layer and work on any PDF including scanned documents.

faq.q: Is annotating a PDF free?
faq.a: Yes, completely free with no account required.

imgCompress.title: Compress Image
imgCompress.desc: Shrink JPG, PNG, and WEBP files without quality loss.

meta.title: Compress Image – Free Online
meta.description: Reduce the size of JPG, PNG, WEBP files. Free, in-browser.

imgCompress.heading: Compress Image
imgCompress.sub: Reduce the size of JPG, PNG, WEBP files.

faq.q: How do I compress an image online for free?
faq.a: Upload your image, adjust the quality slider, and click Compress Image. Your compressed image downloads with the new file size shown.

faq.q: What image formats can I compress?
faq.a: JPG, PNG, and WebP formats are supported.

faq.q: How much can image compression reduce file size?
faq.a: Typically 40–80% reduction depending on the original. The preview shows you the result before downloading.

faq.q: Will my image look different after compression?
faq.a: At quality 80 and above the difference is invisible to the naked eye. The before/after preview lets you compare.

faq.q: Is my image uploaded to a server?
faq.a: No. Compression uses browser-image-compression and runs entirely in your browser.

imgConvert.title: Convert Format
imgConvert.desc: Instantly convert between JPG ↔ PNG ↔ WEBP.

meta.title: Convert Image Format – Free Online
meta.description: Instantly convert between JPG, PNG, WEBP. Free, in-browser.

imgConvert.heading: Convert Format

faq.q: How do I convert an image format online?
faq.a: Upload your image, choose the output format (JPG, PNG, WebP), and click Convert. The converted image downloads to your device.

faq.q: What image formats are supported?
faq.a: You can convert between JPG, PNG, and WebP formats.

faq.q: Does converting PNG to JPG lose quality?
faq.a: PNG to JPG conversion removes the transparency layer — transparent areas become white. Image quality is otherwise preserved.

faq.q: Can I convert multiple images at once?
faq.a: Upload multiple images and each will be converted individually for download.

faq.q: Is image conversion free?
faq.a: Yes, completely free with no account required.

imgRemoveBg.title: Remove Background
imgRemoveBg.desc: Automatically remove image backgrounds with AI.

meta.title: Remove Background – Free Online AI
meta.description: Automatically remove backgrounds from images. Runs entirely in your browser.

imgRemoveBg.heading: Remove Background
imgRemoveBg.sub: Automatically remove backgrounds from images. Runs entirely in your browser.
imgRemoveBg.aiBadge: AI-powered · Your data never leaves your device
imgRemoveBg.modelNote: The model is downloaded on first use (~40 MB). Subsequent uses are faster.

faq.q: How do I remove the background from an image for free?
faq.a: Upload your image and the AI model automatically detects and removes the background. The result downloads as a transparent PNG.

faq.q: Does background removal work on photos of people?
faq.a: Yes. The AI is optimized for portraits and works well on people, pets, and objects with clear edges.

faq.q: What is the output format after removing background?
faq.a: Always PNG, because PNG supports transparent backgrounds. JPG does not support transparency.

faq.q: How accurate is the background removal?
faq.a: For photos with clear subject separation, accuracy is very high. Complex backgrounds or fine hair may have minor imperfections.

faq.q: Is my photo uploaded to a server for AI processing?
faq.a: No. The AI model runs entirely in your browser. Your photos never leave your device.

imgResize.title: Resize Image

meta.title: Resize Image – Free Online
meta.description: Set the width and height of an image. Free, in-browser.

imgResize.heading: Resize Image
imgResize.sub: Set the width and height of an image. Use the aspect ratio lock to preserve proportions.

faq.q: How do I resize an image online?
faq.a: Upload your image, enter the target width and height or a percentage, and click Resize. The resized image downloads instantly.

faq.q: Can I resize while keeping the aspect ratio?
faq.a: Yes. Enable Keep aspect ratio and enter only one dimension — the other adjusts automatically.

faq.q: Will resizing reduce image quality?
faq.a: Downscaling preserves quality well. Upscaling may introduce some blurriness, which is a limitation of pixel-based images.

faq.q: What formats are supported for resizing?
faq.a: JPG, PNG, and WebP images are supported.

faq.q: Is there a maximum size I can resize to?
faq.a: No hard limit. You can upscale or downscale to any dimensions.

imgCrop.title: Crop Image
imgCrop.desc: Crop any area from your image.

meta.title: Crop Image – Free Online
meta.description: Crop any area from your image. Free, in-browser.

imgCrop.heading: Crop Image
imgCrop.sub: Crop any area from your image and download it.

faq.q: How do I crop an image online for free?
faq.a: Upload your image, drag the crop handles to select the area you want to keep, and click Crop. Your cropped image downloads instantly.

faq.q: Can I crop to a specific aspect ratio?
faq.a: Yes. Choose a preset ratio (1:1, 16:9, 4:3) or set a custom ratio to constrain the selection.

faq.q: Does cropping reduce image quality?
faq.a: No. The selected area is extracted at full original resolution.

faq.q: Can I adjust the crop selection before saving?
faq.a: Yes. Adjust the selection as many times as needed before clicking Download.

faq.q: What image formats does the crop tool support?
faq.a: JPG, PNG, and WebP formats are supported.

imgRotate.title: Rotate / Flip Image

meta.title: Rotate Image – Free Online
meta.description: Rotate or flip an image. Free, in-browser.

imgRotate.heading: Rotate / Flip Image
imgRotate.sub: Rotate or flip an image horizontally or vertically.

faq.q: How do I rotate an image online?
faq.a: Upload your image, click the rotation buttons (90° left, 90° right, 180°) or flip horizontally/vertically, then download.

faq.q: Can I flip an image horizontally or vertically?
faq.a: Yes. Use the flip buttons to mirror your image left-right or top-bottom.

faq.q: Does rotating an image reduce its quality?
faq.a: No. Rotation and flipping are lossless — no pixels are lost or re-encoded.

faq.q: Can I rotate to custom angles like 45 degrees?
faq.a: Currently only 90°, 180°, and 270° rotations are supported. Custom angle rotation is planned for a future update.

faq.q: Is image rotation free?
faq.a: Yes, completely free with no account required.

imgToPdf.title: Image → PDF
imgToPdf.desc: Convert images into a single PDF.

meta.title: Image to PDF – Free Online
meta.description: Convert JPG, PNG, WEBP images into a single PDF file. Free, in-browser.

imgToPdf.heading: Image → PDF
imgToPdf.sub: Convert JPG, PNG, and WEBP images into a single PDF file.

faq.q: How do I convert images to PDF?
faq.a: Upload one or more images, reorder them if needed, and click Convert to PDF. All images become pages in a single PDF file.

faq.q: Can I combine multiple images into one PDF?
faq.a: Yes. Each image becomes a separate page in the output PDF.

faq.q: What image formats can I convert to PDF?
faq.a: JPG, PNG, and WebP images are supported.

faq.q: Will image quality be preserved in the PDF?
faq.a: Yes. Images are embedded at their original resolution.

faq.q: Is there a limit on how many images I can convert?
faq.a: No hard limit. Add as many images as needed.

imgHeicToJpg.title: HEIC → JPG

meta.title: HEIC to JPG – Free Online
meta.description: Convert iPhone photos (HEIC/HEIF) to JPG format. Free, in-browser.

imgHeicToJpg.heading: HEIC → JPG
imgHeicToJpg.sub: Convert iPhone photos (HEIC/HEIF) to JPG format.
imgHeicToJpg.privacy: All processing happens in your browser. Your photos are never sent to a server.
imgHeicToJpg.success: file(s) converted to JPG and downloaded!
imgHeicToJpg.errFormat: An error occurred. Make sure your file is actually in HEIC/HEIF format.

faq.q: How do I convert iPhone HEIC photos to JPG?
faq.a: Upload your HEIC file and click Convert. The JPG version downloads instantly and works on all devices and apps.

faq.q: Why are iPhone photos in HEIC format?
faq.a: Apple uses HEIC because it offers better compression than JPG while maintaining quality. However, not all apps support it.

faq.q: Does HEIC to JPG conversion reduce quality?
faq.a: Minor quality loss may occur since HEIC uses more efficient compression. In practice the difference is barely noticeable.

faq.q: Can I convert multiple HEIC files at once?
faq.a: Yes. Upload multiple HEIC files and they will all be converted individually.

faq.q: Is HEIC to JPG conversion free?
faq.a: Yes, completely free with no account required.

imgWatermark.title: Add Watermark
imgWatermark.desc: Stamp custom text watermark on your image.

meta.title: Image Watermark – Free Online
meta.description: Add a custom text watermark to your image. Free, in-browser.

imgWatermark.heading: Add Watermark
imgWatermark.sub: Add a custom text watermark to your image.
imgWatermark.privacy: All processing happens in your browser. Your images are never sent to a server.

faq.q: How do I add a watermark to an image?
faq.a: Upload your image, type your watermark text, choose font size, opacity, color, and position, then click Add Watermark.

faq.q: Can I make the watermark semi-transparent?
faq.a: Yes. Adjust the opacity slider — lower values make the watermark more transparent.

faq.q: Can I position the watermark anywhere on the image?
faq.a: Choose from preset positions: center, corners, or edges of the image.

faq.q: Will the watermark be permanent?
faq.a: Yes. The watermark is merged into the image pixels. Keep your original file if you need to make changes later.

faq.q: Does watermarking work on PNG images?
faq.a: Yes. JPG, PNG, and WebP images are all supported.

imgAddText.title: Add Text to Image
imgAddText.desc: Click anywhere on the image to place custom text.

meta.title: Add Text to Image – Free Online
meta.description: Type text and click to place it on your image. Free, in-browser.

imgAddText.heading: Add Text to Image
imgAddText.sub: Type your text, then click anywhere on the image to place it.
imgAddText.privacy: All processing happens in your browser. Your images are never sent to a server.
imgAddText.clickToPlace: Click on the image below to place the text
imgAddText.enterFirst: Enter text above, then click the image to place it
imgAddText.addFirst: Add text to the image first

faq.q: How do I add text to an image online?
faq.a: Upload your image, type your text, choose font size and color, then click anywhere on the image to place the text. Download when ready.

faq.q: Can I change the text color?
faq.a: Yes. Use the color picker to choose any text color.

faq.q: Can I add multiple text labels to one image?
faq.a: Yes. Place text at multiple positions by clicking in different areas of the image.

faq.q: Is the text permanently embedded in the image?
faq.a: Yes. Text is rendered onto the image. Keep your original if you need to edit later.

faq.q: What image formats are supported?
faq.a: JPG, PNG, and WebP images are supported.

convWordToPdf.title: Word → PDF

meta.title: Word to PDF – Free Online
meta.description: Convert Word (.docx) documents to PDF. Free, in-browser.

convWordToPdf.heading: Word → PDF
convWordToPdf.sub: Convert Word (.docx) documents to PDF format. Runs in your browser.

faq.q: How do I convert Word to PDF online for free?
faq.a: Upload your .docx file and click Convert to PDF. Your PDF downloads instantly with formatting preserved.

faq.q: Does Word to PDF conversion preserve formatting?
faq.a: Basic formatting like headings, bold, italic, and paragraph structure is preserved. Complex layouts with tables convert well.

faq.q: What Word formats are supported?
faq.a: .docx (Word 2007+) is fully supported. Convert older .doc files to .docx in Word first.

faq.q: Is my Word document uploaded to a server?
faq.a: No. The conversion uses mammoth.js and runs entirely in your browser.

faq.q: Is Word to PDF conversion free?
faq.a: Yes, completely free with no account required.

convExcelToPdf.title: Excel → PDF

meta.title: Excel to PDF – Free Online
meta.description: Convert Excel files to PDF. Free, in-browser.

convExcelToPdf.heading: Excel → PDF
convExcelToPdf.privacy: All processing happens in your browser. Your files are never sent to a server.
convExcelToPdf.drop: Drag XLSX or XLS file here
convExcelToPdf.errDefault: Could not convert file. Make sure it is a valid XLSX/XLS file.

faq.q: How do I convert Excel to PDF online?
faq.a: Upload your .xlsx file and click Convert to PDF. Each sheet becomes a page in the output PDF.

faq.q: Does the conversion support multiple sheets?
faq.a: Yes. Each worksheet is converted to a separate page in the PDF.

faq.q: Does the conversion preserve Excel formulas?
faq.a: The tool converts the calculated values visible in cells, not the formulas themselves.

faq.q: Is my Excel file uploaded to a server?
faq.a: No. Conversion uses xlsx.js and jsPDF and runs entirely in your browser.

faq.q: Is Excel to PDF conversion free?
faq.a: Yes, completely free with no account required.

convHtmlToPdf.title: HTML → PDF
convHtmlToPdf.desc: Convert HTML code or a file to PDF.

meta.title: HTML to PDF – Free Online
meta.description: Convert HTML code or file to PDF. Free, in-browser.

convHtmlToPdf.heading: HTML → PDF
convHtmlToPdf.sub: Convert HTML code or a file to PDF.
convHtmlToPdf.privacy: All processing happens in your browser. Your files are never sent to a server.
convHtmlToPdf.errGeneric: An error occurred during conversion. Please try again.

faq.q: How do I convert HTML to PDF online?
faq.a: Paste your HTML code into the editor or upload an HTML file, then click Convert to PDF.

faq.q: Does HTML to PDF conversion preserve CSS styles?
faq.a: Basic inline and embedded CSS styles are preserved. External stylesheets loaded by URL may not render due to browser security restrictions.

faq.q: Can I convert a webpage to PDF?
faq.a: You can paste the HTML source of a webpage. For full rendering with external CSS, use your browser's Print to PDF feature.

faq.q: Is my HTML content uploaded to a server?
faq.a: No. Conversion uses html2canvas and jsPDF in your browser.

faq.q: Is HTML to PDF conversion free?
faq.a: Yes, completely free.

convMdToPdf.title: Markdown → PDF

meta.title: Markdown to PDF – Free Online

convMdToPdf.heading: Markdown → PDF
convMdToPdf.sub: Convert Markdown text or a .md file to PDF.
convMdToPdf.privacy: All processing happens in your browser. Your files are never sent to a server.
convMdToPdf.errGeneric: An error occurred during conversion. Please try again.

faq.q: How do I convert Markdown to PDF?
faq.a: Paste your Markdown text or upload a .md file, then click Convert to PDF. The formatted PDF downloads immediately.

faq.q: Does Markdown to PDF support all Markdown syntax?
faq.a: Standard Markdown is supported: headings, bold, italic, lists, code blocks, blockquotes, and links.

faq.q: Is the output PDF formatted nicely?
faq.a: Yes. The PDF uses clean typography with proper heading sizes, code formatting, and paragraph spacing.

faq.q: Can I convert GitHub Markdown files?
faq.a: Yes. Upload your .md file directly or paste the content.

faq.q: Is Markdown to PDF conversion free?
faq.a: Yes, completely free.

vidCompress.title: Compress Video
vidCompress.desc: Shrink video files without losing quality.

meta.title: Compress Video – Free Online
meta.description: Reduce video file size. Powered by ffmpeg.wasm, free, in-browser.

vidCompress.heading: Compress Video
vidCompress.sub: Reduce the size of MP4, MOV, and WEBM videos.
vidCompress.privacy: All processing happens in your browser. Your videos are never sent to a server.

faq.q: How do I compress a video online for free?
faq.a: Upload your video, choose the compression level, and click Compress. FFmpeg runs in your browser to reduce file size.

faq.q: How much can video compression reduce file size?
faq.a: Typically 40–70% reduction. Higher compression reduces quality slightly.

faq.q: Does video compression reduce quality?
faq.a: Some quality loss is inevitable. Choose lower compression for better quality, higher compression for smaller files.

faq.q: What video formats are supported?
faq.a: MP4, WebM, and MOV files are supported.

faq.q: Is my video uploaded to a server?
faq.a: No. Compression uses FFmpeg.wasm and runs entirely in your browser.

vidTrim.title: Trim Video
vidTrim.desc: Cut any portion of your video.

meta.title: Trim Video – Free Online
meta.description: Cut any section of a video. Powered by ffmpeg.wasm, free, in-browser.

vidTrim.heading: Trim Video
vidTrim.sub: Cut any section of a video and download it.
vidTrim.privacy: All processing happens in your browser. Your videos are never sent to a server.

faq.q: How do I trim a video online?
faq.a: Upload your video, set the start and end time using the sliders, and click Trim. The trimmed clip downloads to your device.

faq.q: Will trimming reduce video quality?
faq.a: No. The tool cuts at the exact timestamps without re-encoding, preserving original quality.

faq.q: What video formats are supported?
faq.a: MP4, WebM, and MOV formats are supported.

faq.q: Is there a maximum video length I can trim?
faq.a: No length limit, but longer videos require more browser memory. Very long videos may take a minute to process.

faq.q: Is my video uploaded to a server?
faq.a: No. Trimming runs with FFmpeg.wasm entirely in your browser.

vidToMp3.title: Video → MP3
vidToMp3.desc: Extract audio from video as MP3.

meta.title: Video to MP3 – Free Online
meta.description: Extract audio from video and download as MP3. Powered by ffmpeg.wasm.

vidToMp3.heading: Video → MP3
vidToMp3.sub: Extract audio from a video and download it as MP3.
vidToMp3.privacy: All processing happens in your browser. Your videos are never sent to a server.

faq.q: How do I extract audio from a video?
faq.a: Upload your video file and click Extract Audio. The audio track downloads as an MP3 file.

faq.q: What quality is the extracted MP3?
faq.a: Audio is extracted at the original bitrate of the video, typically 128–192 kbps.

faq.q: What video formats can I extract audio from?
faq.a: MP4, WebM, MOV, and most common video formats are supported.

faq.q: Is audio extraction free?
faq.a: Yes, completely free with no limits.

faq.q: Is my video uploaded to a server?
faq.a: No. Extraction runs with FFmpeg.wasm in your browser.

vidConvert.title: Convert Video
vidConvert.desc: Switch format between MP4, WEBM, AVI, MOV.

meta.title: Convert Video – Free Online
meta.description: Convert between video formats. Powered by ffmpeg.wasm, free, in-browser.

vidConvert.heading: Convert Video
vidConvert.privacy: All processing happens in your browser. Your videos are never sent to a server.

faq.q: How do I convert video format online for free?
faq.a: Upload your video, choose the output format (MP4, WebM, MOV, AVI), and click Convert.

faq.q: What video formats can I convert between?
faq.a: MP4, WebM, MOV, and AVI formats are supported for both input and output.

faq.q: Does video conversion reduce quality?
faq.a: Re-encoding to a different format involves some quality trade-off. For same-format conversions, quality loss is minimal.

faq.q: How long does video conversion take?
faq.a: It depends on video length and your device. FFmpeg.wasm runs in your browser so speed depends on your CPU.

faq.q: Is my video uploaded during conversion?
faq.a: No. All conversion happens in your browser using FFmpeg.wasm.

vidToGif.title: Video → GIF
vidToGif.desc: Create an animated GIF from a video.

meta.title: Video to GIF – Free Online
meta.description: Create an animated GIF from a video. Powered by ffmpeg.wasm.

vidToGif.heading: Video → GIF
vidToGif.sub: Create an animated GIF from a video.
vidToGif.privacy: All processing happens in your browser. Your videos are never sent to a server.

faq.q: How do I convert a video to GIF online?
faq.a: Upload your video, set the start time, duration, and output size, then click Convert to GIF. The animated GIF downloads instantly.

faq.q: What is the recommended GIF duration?
faq.a: Keep GIFs under 10 seconds for manageable file sizes. GIF files grow very large quickly.

faq.q: Will the GIF have sound?
faq.a: No. GIF format does not support audio.

faq.q: What video formats can I convert to GIF?
faq.a: MP4, WebM, and MOV files are supported.

faq.q: Why is my GIF file so large?
faq.a: GIF is an inefficient format for video. Reduce the size, duration, or frame rate to get a smaller file.

vidMerge.title: Merge Videos
vidMerge.desc: Join multiple video files into one.

meta.title: Merge Videos – Free Online
meta.description: Combine multiple videos in sequence. Powered by ffmpeg.wasm.

vidMerge.heading: Merge Videos
vidMerge.privacy: All processing happens in your browser. Your videos are never sent to a server.

faq.q: How do I merge multiple videos online?
faq.a: Upload your video files, reorder them if needed, and click Merge. All videos are joined into a single file and download to your device.

faq.q: Do all videos need to have the same format?
faq.a: For best results, use videos with the same format and resolution. Mixed formats will be re-encoded to match.

faq.q: Will merging reduce video quality?
faq.a: If all videos have the same format, quality loss is minimal. Merging mixed formats requires re-encoding.

faq.q: Is there a limit on how many videos I can merge?
faq.a: No hard limit, but browser memory limits apply for very large files.

faq.q: Is video merging free?
faq.a: Yes, completely free using FFmpeg.wasm in your browser.

vidMute.title: Mute Video
vidMute.desc: Remove all audio from a video file.

meta.title: Mute Video – Free Online
meta.description: Remove audio from a video file. Powered by ffmpeg.wasm.

vidMute.heading: Mute Video
vidMute.sub: Completely remove audio from a video file.
vidMute.privacy: All processing happens in your browser. Your videos are never sent to a server.
vidMute.warning: This operation permanently removes the audio track from the video. This cannot be undone.

faq.q: How do I remove audio from a video?
faq.a: Upload your video and click Remove Audio. The video downloads without any sound track.

faq.q: Does removing audio reduce video quality?
faq.a: No. The video stream is copied without re-encoding — only the audio track is stripped.

faq.q: What video formats are supported?
faq.a: MP4, WebM, and MOV formats are supported.

faq.q: Can I add a different audio track after muting?
faq.a: This tool only removes audio. To add a new audio track you would need a more advanced video editor.

faq.q: Is my video uploaded to a server?
faq.a: No. Everything runs with FFmpeg.wasm in your browser.

vidRotate.title: Rotate Video

meta.title: Rotate Video – Free Online
meta.description: Rotate or flip a video. Powered by ffmpeg.wasm, free, in-browser.

vidRotate.heading: Rotate Video
vidRotate.sub: Rotate or flip a video horizontally or vertically.
vidRotate.privacy: All processing happens in your browser. Your videos are never sent to a server.

faq.q: How do I rotate a video online?
faq.a: Upload your video, choose the rotation angle (90°, 180°, 270°), and click Rotate. The rotated video downloads to your device.

faq.q: Why do some videos appear sideways on my computer?
faq.a: Videos recorded on phones use rotation metadata. Some players ignore this. Rotating the video permanently fixes the orientation.

faq.q: Does rotating a video reduce its quality?
faq.a: Rotation requires re-encoding, which may cause minimal quality loss. The output uses high-quality settings.

faq.q: What formats are supported for video rotation?
faq.a: MP4, WebM, and MOV formats are supported.

faq.q: Is video rotation free?
faq.a: Yes, completely free using FFmpeg.wasm in your browser.
